name: Feature request
about: Suggest an API, styling, placement, or accessibility improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

What are you trying to build, and why does Quoterm need to support it?

## Proposed API or UX

Describe the behavior, API shape, styling hook, or user experience you want.

```tsx
// Optional sketch of the API or usage.
```

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or existing APIs have you tried?

## Accessibility considerations

How should this behave for keyboard users, screen readers, contrast themes, reduced motion, and focus management?

## Screenshots, GIFs, or references

Attach examples if this is visual or interaction-heavy.
